name: Wok Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose at least 2 vegetables from each group; dice them.
2. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet.
3. Add garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add the selected vegetables from Group 1 to the hot oil; stir-fry for 7 minutes.
5. Add the selected vegetables from Group 2; stir-fry for 5 minutes.
6. Add the selected vegetables from Group 3; stir-fry for 5 minutes.
7. Serve over hot rice.
8. Garnish with cashews before serving.
